title: Unexpected xml node in parseOpen
author: Tri-Vi
body:
I got this issue when I tried to parse an excel file, but I'm not sure what caused the issue. Could someone help me with this?

exceljs version: 1.15.0

```
Error: Unexpected xml node in parseOpen: {"name":"x:sst","attributes":{"xmlns:x":"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"},"isSelfClosing":false}
    at SharedStringsXform.parseOpen (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/xlsx/xform/strings/shared-strings-xform.js:124:17)
    at SAXStream.<anonymous> (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/xlsx/xform/base-xform.js:104:19)
    at emitOne (events.js:116:13)
    at SAXStream.emit (events.js:211:7)
    at SAXParser.me._parser.(anonymous function) [as onopentag] (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:258:17)
    at emit (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:624:35)
    at emitNode (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:629:5)
    at openTag (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:825:5)
    at SAXParser.write (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:1391:13)
    at SAXStream.write (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/sax/lib/sax.js:239:18)
    at /Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:259:14
    at new Promise (<anonymous>)
    at write (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:258:14)
    at Array.map (<anonymous>)
    at StreamBuf._pipe (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:265:31)
    at StreamBuf._flush (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:336:14)
    at writeComplete (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:352:15)
    at StreamBuf.end (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:365:7)
    at StreamBuf.pipe (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/stream-buf.js:418:12)
    at SharedStringsXform.parseStream (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/xlsx/xform/base-xform.js:138:14)
    at ZipReader.<anonymous> (/Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/xlsx/xlsx.js:356:43)
    at emitOne (events.js:116:13)
    at ZipReader.emit (events.js:211:7)
    at /Users/tvi/Documents/BCM projects/cvd-genomics/node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/zip-stream.js:95:22
    at <anonymous>
```

comments.author: straiki
comments.body:
I've had same problem lately, found out why.

If you have data table in excel sheet, you need to clear all filtres unless you'll end up with this error.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/724967/118241741-c81a5980-b49c-11eb-8e35-48f4811953d6.png)

comments.author: Emiya0306
comments.body:
+1, I got these error messages.
```
/Users/xxxxx/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/core/core-xform.js:79
        throw new Error(`Unexpected xml node in parseOpen: ${JSON.stringify(node)}`);
              ^

Error: Unexpected xml node in parseOpen: {"name":"lastModifiedBy","attributes":{},"isSelfClosing":false}
    at CoreXform.parseOpen (/xxxxx/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/core/core-xform.js:79:15)
    at CoreXform.parse (/xxxxx/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/base-xform.js:63:16)
    at async XLSX.load (/xxxxx/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:353:36)
    at async XLSX.readFile (/xxxxx/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:55:24)
    at async /xxxxx/edit.js:6:3
```
